title: Not Ya Mama's Cooking — Mexican Catering Restaurant Website

requirements.text: Create a professional, visually rich single-page website for 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking', a Mexican catering business/restaurant serving Phoenix, Arizona. The overall aesthetic should use warm, vibrant Mexican-inspired colors (deep reds, earthy oranges, golden yellows, dark greens) with bold typography, textured backgrounds, and a festive yet upscale restaurant feel. Apply this theme consistently across all sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Warm Mexican-inspired color palette (deep reds, earthy oranges, golden yellows) is used consistently
Typography is bold and professional throughout
Overall design feels upscale yet festive

requirements.text: Display the generated logo (logo.dim_400x400.png) prominently in the header/hero area of the site.

quotes: Create a cool logo with a Mexican lady cooking with cooking materials and an apron on

acceptanceCriteria: Logo appears in the site header and/or hero section
Logo is rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_400x400.png

requirements.text: Implement a sticky header that automatically hides (slides up/off screen) when the user scrolls down and reappears when the user scrolls back up.

quotes: the header going away when I scroll down

acceptanceCriteria: Header is visible at the top of the page on load
Header slides out of view when the user scrolls down
Header reappears smoothly when the user scrolls back up
Transition is smooth/animated

requirements.text: Add a hamburger menu icon (three horizontal lines) in the top-right corner of the header. Clicking it opens a full navigation drawer or dropdown listing all services and menu items (Street Tacos — Chicken & Beef, Burritos, Catering Services). The menu closes when the user clicks outside or selects an item, and it scrolls the user to the relevant section.

quotes: icon tab at the top right corner with three lines with all the services and menu items

acceptanceCriteria: Hamburger icon (≡) is visible in the top-right corner of the header
Clicking the icon opens a navigation menu/drawer
Menu lists all services: Catering Services, Street Tacos (Chicken & Beef), Burritos
Clicking a menu item scrolls to the corresponding section
Menu closes on outside click or item selection

requirements.text: Create a dedicated menu/food showcase section that prominently features: (1) Chicken Street Tacos, (2) Beef Street Tacos, and (3) Burritos. Each item should have a visually appealing card with a title, a short appetizing description, and the generated food image. Street tacos should be highlighted as the signature/featured item.

quotes: really showcase the street tacos that we sell with chicken and beef street tacos and burritos

acceptanceCriteria: Section titled 'Our Menu' or equivalent is present
Chicken Street Tacos card is displayed with image and description
Beef Street Tacos card is displayed with image and description
Burritos card is displayed with image and description
Street tacos are visually emphasized (e.g., featured/larger card or 'signature dish' badge)
Food images are rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated/

requirements.text: Create a catering services section that highlights that 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' offers catering services for events in the Phoenix, Arizona area. Include a list of catering offerings and a call-to-action to contact Jasmine Cota for bookings.

quotes: show off that we cater for Phoenix Arizona area

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Catering' or 'Catering Services' section is present
Phoenix, Arizona area is explicitly mentioned
A call-to-action (e.g., button or link) leads to the contact section

requirements.text: Add a contact section displaying: contact name 'Jasmine Cota' and phone number '(480) 091-4039'. The phone number should be a clickable tel: link. Include a warm, inviting message encouraging visitors to reach out for catering inquiries.

quotes: Phone number is 4800914039 and the name for contact is Jasmine Cota

acceptanceCriteria: Contact section displays name: Jasmine Cota
Contact section displays phone: (480) 091-4039 as a clickable tel: link
Section includes a friendly call-to-action message

requirements.text: Remove any 'Built by Caffeine AI' text, attribution, or branding from the website footer and from every other section of the site.

quotes: Takeoff where it says built by caffeine AI at the bottom of the website

acceptanceCriteria: No 'Built by Caffeine AI' text or attribution appears anywhere on the page
Footer only contains relevant business information

constraints: Phone number must be rendered exactly as (480) 091-4039 and as a clickable tel: link
Contact name must be rendered exactly as Jasmine Cota
No 'Built by Caffeine AI' or any Caffeine AI branding anywhere on the site
No backend logic is required — this is a fully static frontend website

required: Vibrant illustrated logo featuring a smiling Mexican woman in a colorful floral apron, holding a wooden spoon and a skillet, surrounded by cooking ingredients like chili peppers, lime, and cilantro, with bold stylized text 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' below, warm earthy tones (logo.dim_400x400.png)

Appetizing close-up photo-realistic illustration of two chicken street tacos on a rustic wooden board, topped with diced onion, cilantro, lime wedge, and salsa, warm lighting (chicken-tacos.dim_800x600.png)

Appetizing close-up photo-realistic illustration of two beef carne asada street tacos on a rustic wooden board, topped with diced onion, cilantro, lime wedge, and red salsa, warm lighting (beef-tacos.dim_800x600.png)

Appetizing close-up photo-realistic illustration of a large stuffed burrito wrapped in foil at the base, cross-section showing rice, beans, meat and cheese, served with salsa and guacamole on the side, warm lighting (burrito.dim_800x600.png)

Vibrant festive Mexican catering banner illustration showing a spread of tacos, burritos and colorful dishes on a decorated table with string lights and desert sunset background in warm oranges and reds (catering-banner.dim_1200x500.png)
